1.name: Bell Goblin
1.description: Rings its bell to summon a random enemy in battle.

2.name: Goblin Warrior
2.description: A battle-hardened goblin swinging its axe with ruthless precision.

3.name: Goblin Shaman
3.description: Chants curses that warp flesh and mind.

4.name: Goblin Chieftain
4.description: Leads its horde with brutal authority.

5.name: Forest Treant
5.description: An animated oak that smashes foes with gnarled limbs.

6.name: Dodger Imp
6.description: A twisted little demon crackling with embers, it scorches flesh with gleeful malice.

7.name: Frost Elemental
7.description: A living shard of ice whose chilling touch shatters bone and freezes blood in an instant.

8.name: Desert Scorpion
8.description: A hulking arachnid with crystalline pincers, its venom burns like acid and paralyzes on contact.

9.name: Compressed air
9.description: A howling vortex given shape, it slices throats with razor winds and vanishes in a gust.

10.name: Sewers slime
10.description: A filthy ooze that oozes through grates, dissolving flesh and machinery alike in its wake. Almosts immune to magic

11.name: Thunder Sprite
11.description: A crackling wisp of storm energy, it jolts its prey with lightning strikes faster than the eye can follow.

12.name: Crimson Sucker
12.description: A blood-thirsty bird with razor teeth, it drains humors with uncanny speed and leaves corpses pale.

13.name: Sand Golem
13.description: A hulking construct of stone and sand, it smashes skulls with each seismic punch.

14.name: Shadow Wraith
14.description: A drifting specter of pure darkness, it rends souls with ethereal claws and fades before retaliation.

15.name: Water Nymph
15.description: A beguiling spirit, she drags victims beneath the waves to drown in the depths.

16.name: Royal Knight
16.description: A gleaming warrior in cursed plate.

17.name: Dark Mage
17.description: A gaunt sorcerer with sunken eyes, it warps reality with forbidden incantations and curses.

18.name: Frog Monk
18.description: A scaled ascetic whose fists blaze like embers, it shatters ribs with a single breath-charged blow.

19.name: Phantom Archer
19.description: A ghostly marksman loosed from the veil, its spectral arrows pass through flesh to pierce the heart.

20.name: Shadow Thief
20.description: A wraith in human guise, it steals coin and life force alike without a whisper of warning.

21.name: Fiery Sleep Demon
21.description: A yawning fiend swathed in nightmares, it lulls victims with hypnotic embers before incinerating them.

22.name: Frost Dragon
22.description: A colossal wyrm of glacial scales, its icy roar freezes the landscapes.

23.name: Void Sorcerer
23.description: An eldritch conduit to nothingness, its void-fire blasts unravel flesh and sanity in equal measure.

24.name: Royal Champion
24.description: A towering blade-warden in gilded armor, it lays waste to armies with disciplined fury.

25.name: Ancient Lich
25.description: A decrepit sovereign of bones, it weaves death magic that corrodes flesh and curses the soul.

26.name: Mi-go Brain Harvester
26.description: Lovecraftian fungoid alien that collects brains

28.name: Yog-Sothoth Spawn
28.description: Lesser manifestation of the Outer God of time and space

29.name: Nephilim Remnant
29.description: Ancient half-angel being from forgotten texts

31.name: Choronzon
31.description: Crowley's demon of dispersion and ego dissolution

32.name: Grey Zeta Reticulan
32.description: Interdimensional alien entity from Zeta Reticuli system

35.name: Annunaki Overlord
35.description: Ancient alien ruler from Sumerian mythology

37.name: Elder Thing
37.description: Ancient alien race from Lovecraft's At the Mountains of Madness

38.name: Beast 666
38.description: Crowley's great beast persona made manifest

39.name: Yellow King
39.description: Entity from Chambers' The King in Yellow

40.name: Azathoth Fragment
40.description: Manifestation of the blind idiot god at the center of the universe

43.name: Mr. Inadequate
43.description: The most pathetically weak enemy you'll ever face

44.name: Talking Door
44.description: Sentient doorway that somehow walks and speaks

45.name: Bureaucratic Nightmare
45.description: Living embodiment of red tape and paperwork

46.name: Sentient Traffic Cone
46.description: Somehow gained consciousness and a taste for violence

47.description: Office worker trapped in endless internship limbo

48.description: Entity caught in an eternal logical loop

52.description: Terrifyingly positive entity that can inspire even foes

54.name: Interdimensional Tourist

55.name: Hyperdimensional Grimorie

56.description: Giant enemy meme that gained consciousness and physical form <Char:$Virus

98.name: Storm Behemoth

99.name: Tsunami Guardian

100.name: Earth Sentinel

101.name: Wind Leviathan

107.name: Skull Keeper

108.name: Sewer Rat

109.name: Forest Archer
109.description: A skilled archer who blends into forest environments for ambush attacks

110.name: Gorgon Queen
110.description: Serpent-haired woman with a petrifying gaze

111.description: Once a noble warrior now consumed by darkness

112.description: Living manifestation of fire with a volatile temperament

114.description: Living stone creature with tremendous strength and endurance

115.description: Barely visible entity of swirling winds with great speed and agility

116.name: Vampire Lord

117.name: Abyssal Fiend
117.description: Demonic entity summoned from the darkest depths of the underworld

120.name: Luminous Jellyfish

121.description: Half-human, half-machine warrior with advanced combat capabilities

122.name: Combat Drone
122.description: Autonomous flying machine equipped with advanced weaponry

123.name: Battle Mech
123.description: Heavy combat robot with powerful ranged and melee capabilities

124.name: Sacred Phoenix
124.description: Legendary fire bird that rises from its own ashes when defeated

125.name: Ancient Dragon
125.description: Powerful winged reptile with devastating breath weapons and ancient knowledge

126.name: Spectral Wisp
126.description: Ghostly ball of light that leads travelers astray and drains life force

127.name: Mountain Ogre
127.description: Massive, strong humanoid with thick skin and primitive but devastating attacks

128.name: Taxidoggo
128.description: A common woodland rodent, slightly larger and more aggressive than normal.

129.name: Gray Wolf
129.description: A common predator that hunts in packs. Swift and dangerous when hungry.

130.name: Brown Bear
130.description: A powerful forest predator with immense strength and thick fur.

131.name: Venomous Snake
131.description: A deadly reptile with potent venom that can blind and poison its prey.

132.name: Wild Boar
132.description: An aggressive forest dweller with sharp tusks and a bad temper.

133.name: Black Panther
133.description: A stealthy jungle predator with incredible agility and sharp claws.

134.name: Mountain Eagle
134.description: A majestic bird of prey with razor-sharp talons and exceptional vision.

135.name: Tree Monkey
135.description: A mischievous forest dweller that throws objects and can temporarily blind enemies.

136.name: Giant Scorpion
136.description: A dangerous desert arachnid with a venomous stinger and powerful pincers.

137.name: Striped Tiger
137.description: A powerful jungle predator with incredible strength and sharp fangs.

138.name: Vampire Bat
138.description: A nocturnal flying mammal that can drain small amounts of blood from its victims.

139.name: Forest Stag
139.description: A proud forest herbivore with impressive antlers that can deliver powerful charges.

140.name: Golden Lion
140.description: The king of beasts with devastating attacks and a terrifying roar.

141.name: Giant Spider
141.description: A massive arachnid that hunts with poisonous fangs and sticky webs.

142.name: Swamp Crocodile
142.description: An ancient reptilian predator with powerful jaws and armored skin.

143.name: Red Fox
143.description: A cunning forest predator known for its speed and intelligence.

144.name: Armored Rhinoceros
144.description: A massive herbivore with thick skin and a dangerous horn used for charging.

145.name: Giant Jellyfish
145.description: A translucent sea creature with paralyzing tentacles.

147.name: Wildcat
147.description: A fierce feline predator that can deliver multiple attacks in quick succession.

148.name: Komodo Dragon
148.description: A massive predatory lizard with venomous saliva and razor-sharp teeth.

149.name: Peregrine Falcon
149.description: The fastest animal alive, capable of diving at incredible speeds to strike prey.

150.name: Panda
150.description: An enormous and aggressive bear with incredible strength and resilience.

151.name: Monitor Lizard
151.description: A large predatory reptile with a powerful tail and sharp claws.

152.name: Tarantula
152.description: A hairy spider with potent venom and aggressive hunting behavior.

153.name: Alpha Dire Wolf
153.description: The massive leader of a dire wolf pack. Twice the size of normal wolves with unnaturally sharp fangs and a devastating howl that terrifies prey.

154.name: Hellfire Mammoth
154.description: An enormous prehistoric elephant with tusks wreathed in supernatural flames. Its hide is nearly impenetrable and its charge unstoppable.

155.name: Titan Anaconda
155.description: A colossal serpent capable of crushing even the largest prey. Its venom causes paralysis and its constriction can shatter bone.

156.name: Megalodon
156.description: A prehistoric shark of colossal size, thought extinct until now. Its jaws can snap ships in half and its presence causes tidal waves.

157.name: Sabertooth Alpha
157.description: A nightmarish predator with fangs longer than swords. Its roar alone can cause paralysis and its speed defies comprehension.

158.name: Emperor Deathstalker
158.description: A mutated scorpion of terrifying proportions. Its venom is the most potent neurotoxin known, and its armored exoskeleton deflects most attacks.

159.name: Volcanic Wyvern
159.description: A draconic beast that nests in active volcanoes. Its scales are forged in magma, and its breath can melt stone in seconds.

160.name: Blood Leech Colossus
160.description: An abominable mutation that has grown to the size of a house. Capable of draining a human dry in seconds through multiple feeding tubes.

161.name: Tyrant Crocodilian
161.description: An ancient reptile the size of a ship with jaws that can crush steel. It has survived since prehistoric times and developed terrifying intelligence.

162.name: Thunderwing Roc
162.description: A titanic bird of prey that creates storms with its wings. Its talons can lift adult elephants, and its cry shatters eardrums.

163.name: Abyssal Hallucigenia
163.description: A nightmarish arachnid from the deepest caverns. Its webs are stronger than steel cables, and its venom liquefies organs instantly.

164.name: Behemoth Gorilla
164.description: A primeval great ape standing twenty feet tall. Its fists can level buildings, and its territorial rage is unstoppable.

165.name: Kraken Leviathan
165.description: A monstrous cephalopod with hundreds of tentacles. Legend claims it can drag entire ships to the ocean floor with ease.

166.name: Demon Bear
166.description: A corrupted bear of monstrous proportions with blood-red fur. Its roar induces terror, and its claws can shred steel like paper.

167.name: Vampiric Nightwing
167.description: A massive bat with a 30-foot wingspan. It has evolved to drain more than blood, it can absorb life force directly, leaving withered husks behind.

168.name: Ghost Tiger
168.description: An ethereal predator that appears only during blood moons. Its fangs can pierce spiritual defenses, and it can move through solid objects.

169.name: Titanothere Alpha
169.description: A prehistoric rhinoceros-like beast standing 25 feet tall at the shoulder. Its charge can level forests, and its hide is nearly impenetrable.

170.name: World Serpent
170.description: A mythical serpent so vast its body could encircle mountains. Ancient texts speak of it sleeping beneath the world, its movements causing earthquakes.

171.name: Abyssal Sea Dragon
171.description: A hybrid creature combining elements of sea serpents and ancient dragons. It can create whirlpools with its movement and breathe both ice and pressurized water.

172.name: Primordial Behemoth
172.description: One of the first beasts to walk the earth, preserved through unknown means. Its footsteps cause earthquakes, and its primal magic warps reality around it.

173.name: Shock Slime
173.description: A living capacitor of raw electricity, it surges through veins and machinery with crackling delight.

175.name: Crimson Vampire :EP
175.description: An ancient vampire lord who has mastered blood magic. Can drain life, summon minions, and inflict deadly status effects.

176.name: Yog-Sothoth Spawn :EP
176.description: A cosmic horror that exists partially outside reality. It creates reality distortions that cause random status effects each turn.

177.name: Dragon Monk :EP

178.name: Motivational Speaker :EP

179.name: Entropy Wyrm :EP
179.description: A cosmic serpent that consumes energy and magic.

180.name: Battle Mech :EP
180.description: An advanced war machine with adaptive defense systems.

182.name: Celestial Avatar :EP
182.description: A divine manifestation that channels cosmic forces.

183.name: Blood Countess :EP

185.name: Quantum Fluctuation :EP

186.description: A bloated grub crawling in carrion, it devours rot and breeds in the stench of decay.

187.name: Plaguebro Rattus
187.description: The bloated king of the sewer rats, Plaguelord Rattus commands disease and vermin. Resistant to ice but weak to poison.

188.name: Reaganite
188.description: A fragment of the shattered soul of Ronald Reagan

189.name: Tanko
189.description: The most serene homemade battle tank

277.description: A fallen holy warrior who now feeds on life essence, wielding corrupted divine power alongside vampiric abilities

278.name: Ethereal Devourer
278.description: An incorporeal entity that consumes memories and emotions, leaving victims as empty husks

279.name: Ocean Warlock
279.description: A masterful water mage who commands fierce currents and can draw the moisture from living bodies

280.name: Mountain Crusher
280.description: A stone giant whose footsteps cause minor earthquakes and who can weaponize boulders with devastating force

281.name: Mind Manipulator
281.description: A powerful telepath who can implant false memories and turn companions against each other

282.name: Proto Turret
282.description: An ancient mechanical guardian with rotating armor plates that adapt to different types of attacks

283.name: Toxic Amalgam
283.description: A fusion of multiple slimes that can separate and recombine at will, each component possessing different toxins

284.name: Permafrost Conjurer
284.description: An ice mage who can create weapons and shields from frost, manipulating them with precise telekinetic control

285.name: Infernal Prodigy
285.description: A young fire elemental with unusually developed powers, capable of creating precise flame constructs

286.name: Necrotic Champion
286.description: A warrior who died in battle but refused to pass on, now fighting with supernatural strength and resilience

287.name: Devoted Templar
287.description: A holy warrior whose faith manifests as powerful defensive auras and smiting attacks against the unholy

288.name: Venom Lord
288.description: A master of poisons who has transformed his own body into a toxic vessel, exuding deadly vapors

289.name: Midnight Hunter
289.description: A specialized assassin who hunts magical creatures, using enchanted weapons that disrupt arcane abilities

290.name: Cloud Giant
290.description: An air elemental that can compress itself into devastating wind blades or expand to create widespread chaos

291.name: Scorched Tyrant
291.description: A fire-breathing reptilian beast with scale plates that radiate intense heat, setting nearby objects aflame

292.name: Coral Enchantress
292.description: A sea witch who commands aquatic creatures and can temporarily transform opponents into marine life

293.name: Nervous System
293.description: A phantasmal entity that can manifest victims' deepest fears as temporary physical constructs

294.name: Forest's Vengeance
294.description: A plant-animal hybrid that can rapidly grow thorny vines to entangle prey before injecting neurotoxins

295.name: Void Manipulator
295.description: A cloaked spellcaster who can open brief portals to the void, unleashing chaotic energies that distort reality

296.name: Primal Sloth
296.description: An ancient forest protector with bark-like skin that can command plants and vines to restrain intruders

297.name: Divine Arbiter
297.description: A celestial enforcer who judges the worthy and unworthy, wielding blinding light that can stun opponents

298.name: Paralytic Slug
298.description: A stealthy predator with barbed stingers that inject a potent neurotoxin, immobilizing prey for easy consumption

299.name: Molten Juggernaut
299.description: A massive elemental fusion of fire and earth that can hurl flaming boulders and create waves of scorching heat

300.name: Crimson Harbinger
300.description: A winged demonic entity that breathes streams of wildfire and leaves a trail of burning embers in its wake

301.name: Fey Enchantress
301.description: A woodland fairy with powerful charm magic who can turn nature itself against intruders in her domain

302.name: Tide Sculptor
302.description: A master of water magic who can form precise aquatic constructs and control the moisture in the air

304.name: Star Caller
304.description: A celestial mystic who can channel cosmic energy to create miniature stars that orbit and protect them

305.name: Essence Leech
305.description: A vampiric entity that drains not just blood but life force itself, growing stronger and faster with each successful attack

306.name: Bone Commander
306.description: A skeletal warlord who can command lesser undead and whose ancient weapons cause wounds that resist magical healing

307.name: Winter's Herald
307.description: A powerful frost mage who summons ice storms and can create temporary duplicates of themselves from snow

308.name: Venomfang Archer
308.description: A reptilian hunter who coats arrows with a fast-acting paralytic toxin harvested from rare jungle plants

309.name: Thought Weaver
309.description: A psychic who can implant false memories and create realistic illusions by manipulating neural pathways

310.name: Luminous Defender
310.description: A holy knight whose armor channels divine energy, creating barriers of light that repel unholy creatures

311.name: Jungle Predator
311.description: A carnivorous plant-beast hybrid that uses pheromones to lure prey before striking with poisonous thorns

312.name: Ember Centipede
312.description: A massive centipede with scales that burn like hot coals, capable of spitting streams of liquid fire

313.name: Mystic Prodigy
313.description: A young but extraordinarily gifted mage who can manipulate multiple elements simultaneously with instinctive precision

314.name: Gilded Guardian
314.description: A magical construct of animated gold and precious metals that becomes harder to damage as the battle progresses

315.name: Infernal Devastator
315.description: A demonic entity wreathed in perpetual flames that can unleash concentrated fire blasts that melt stone

316.name: Mountain Giant
316.description: A massive stone giant whose footsteps cause minor tremors and who can hurl boulders with devastating accuracy

317.name: Ethereal Tactician
317.description: A spectral commander who can analyze and counter enemy strategies while creating illusory duplicates

318.name: Frost Archmagus
318.description: A master of ice magic who can summon blizzards and create crystalline constructs that fight autonomously

320.name: Shadow Executioner
320.description: An elite assassin who can teleport through shadows and deliver strikes that cause lingering wounds

321.name: Maelstrom Sovereign
321.description: A powerful water beast that can create whirlpools and control multiple water tendrils simultaneously

322.name: Nightmare Bacteria
322.description: A powerful dream entity that can manifest victims' deepest fears as temporary physical constructs

323.name: Crimson Patriarch
323.description: An ancient vampire who can command lesser undead and transform into a cloud of mist to avoid damage

324.name: Crag Behemoth
324.description: A giant elemental fusion of stone and crystal that can redirect magical attacks and absorb minerals to heal

325.name: Abyssal Horror
325.description: A shapeless entity from the depths that can engulf victims whole and digest them within its amorphous body

326.name: Astral Sentinel
326.description: A radiant celestial guardian that can teleport instantly between locations and manipulate light as a weapon

328.name: Radiant Justicar
328.description: A divine champion who channels pure light energy, creating weapons and shields of solidified radiance

329.name: Mind Overlord
329.description: A powerful psychic who can dominate multiple minds simultaneously and create devastating telekinetic force waves

330.name: Skulmire Slime
330.description: A monstrous slime that spins webs of pure shadow that drain life force and restrict movement

331.name: Mountain Devastator
331.description: A colossal earth elemental that can reshape terrain at will and cause localized earthquakes with each step

332.name: Infernal Monarch
332.description: An ancient fire dragon whose mere presence causes flammable materials to ignite and metal to warp from heat

333.name: Mercury Dragon
333.description: A massive ice dragon whose breath can instantly freeze living creatures solid and shatter them with a touch

334.name: Forest Sovereign
334.description: A master archer infused with nature magic who can control plant life and fire arrows that split into multiple projectiles

335.name: Stone Shifter
335.description: A small earth elemental that can camouflage itself among rocks and surprise unwary travelers

336.name: Ember Imp
336.description: A mischievous fire sprite that enjoys startling travelers with small flame bursts

338.name: Bone Sentinel
338.description: A skeletal guardian animated by minor necromantic magic, tasked with protecting ancient burial sites

339.name: Shadow Stalker
339.description: A stealthy predator that blends with darkness and strikes from behind with surprising speed

341.name: Novice Paladin
341.description: A young holy warrior still learning to channel divine magic, but devoted to vanquishing evil

342.name: Frost Apprentice
342.description: A novice ice mage who can create small ice shards and cool the surrounding air

345.name: Novice Illusionist
345.description: A beginning magic user specialized in creating minor illusions to confuse opponents

346.name: Stone Guardian
346.description: A magically animated stone construct that follows simple commands to protect an area

347.name: Fear Siphon
347.description: A shadowy entity that feeds on fear and can cause momentary panic in its victims

349.name: Wandering Archer
349.description: A heavily armored archer who roams the land seeking to prove their combat prowess

350.name: Zephyr Wizard
350.description: A wizard that can create gusts of wind and small whirlwinds

351.name: Siren Apprentice
351.description: A young aquatic humanoid learning to use enchanting songs to influence the minds of others

352.name: Blood Initiate
352.description: A novice practitioner of blood magic who can inflict minor wounds at a distance

353.name: Webweaver
353.description: A large spider that spins sticky webs to trap prey and can deliver mildly paralytic bites

354.name: Stealthy Operative
354.description: A stealthy operative who uses throwing knives coated with mild sleep-inducing toxins

355.name: Magma Overlord
355.description: A colossal dragon-like beast that lives in volcanic chambers, its body constantly oozing molten rock that instantly incinerates anything it touches

356.name: Nightmare Sovereign
356.description: A terrifying entity born from collective fears, able to manifest nightmares into reality and trap victims in endless cycles of their deepest terrors

357.name: Soul Harvester
357.description: A horrific reaper whose scythe severs the connection between body and soul, collecting spirits to power its forbidden magic

358.name: Mountain Devastator
358.description: An ancient stone titan that has slumbered beneath mountains for millennia, now awakened and enraged, able to cause devastating earthquakes with each step

359.name: Crimson Tyrant
359.description: A monstrous vampire lord who has transcended death itself, capable of draining entire villages in a single night and controlling blood like a living weapon

360.name: War Colossus
360.description: An enormous battle construct forged by ancient smiths using forbidden metallurgy and the souls of a thousand warriors, wielding weapons larger than most buildings

361.name: Obsidian Dreadnought
361.description: A towering golem crafted from volcanic glass that absorbs magical energy, growing stronger with each spell cast in its vicinity

362.name: Abyssal Devourer
362.description: A massive amorphous horror from the ocean depths that can dissolve almost any material on contact and absorb the properties of what it consumes

363.name: Maelstrom Leviathan
363.description: A colossal sea serpent that creates massive whirlpools capable of dragging entire ships into the depths, its scales constantly shifting and flowing like liquid

364.name: Glacial Titan
364.description: An ancient ice elemental so powerful that the air freezes solid around it, creating crystal sculptures of anything that approaches too closely

365.name: Shadow Assassin
365.description: A legendary killer who has mastered forbidden shadow magic, able to move between dimensions and strike from impossible angles

366.name: Mind Tyrant
366.description: A psionicist of devastating power who can control multiple minds simultaneously and reshape reality itself with pure thought

367.name: Celestial Arbiter
367.description: A divine enforcer sent to eradicate corruption, wielding weapons of pure holy light that can cleave through any defense

368.name: Infernal Annihilator
368.description: A demonic engine of destruction whose body is a gateway to the elemental plane of fire, surrounding everything nearby in an inescapable inferno

369.name: Flower Behemoth
369.description: A massive mutated flower whose every pore seeps deadly toxins, creating clouds of poison that kill all life for miles around

370.name: Void Weaver
370.description: A cosmic horror that exists half in our reality and half beyond, spinning webs of anti-matter that erase anything they touch from existence

371.name: Storm Harbinger
371.description: A primordial air bird capable of creating hurricanes at will, its body a swirling vortex of lightning and wind that tears apart anything in its path

372.name: Frost Monarch
372.description: The undisputed ruler of winter, an ancient dragon whose frigid breath can instantly freeze an entire army solid and shatter them with a gesture

373.name: Mountain King
373.description: An ancient earth elemental of unimaginable power that has become one with an entire mountain range, causing tectonic shifts with its movements

374.name: Bloodlord Supreme
374.description: The progenitor of all vampires, an ancient evil that can command oceans of blood and drain the life force from entire regions with a mere thought

375.name: Hobgoblin Runt
375.description: A scrawny, underfed goblin that barely knows how to hold a weapon

376.name: Hobgoblin Scout
376.description: A quick-footed goblin that serves as the eyes and ears of its tribe

377.name: Hobgoblin Archer
377.description: A goblin that has developed some skill with crude bows and poisoned arrows

378.name: Hobgoblin Shaman
378.description: A goblin with limited magical abilities, often serving as a spiritual leader for small tribes

379.name: Hobgoblin Warrior
379.description: A battle-hardened goblin with some actual combat training and better equipment

380.name: Hobgoblin Firestarter
380.description: A pyromaniac goblin that has learned rudimentary fire magic and delights in burning things

381.name: Goblin Mounted Archer
381.description: A goblin archer that rides atop a trained wolf, allowing for hit-and-run tactics

382.name: Goblin Cavalry
382.description: An elite goblin mounted on a large wolf, trained in coordinated pack tactics

383.name: Goblin Witch Doctor
383.description: A powerful goblin spellcaster who has mastered curses and crude but effective dark magic

384.name: Goblin Elite Guard
384.description: A goblin warrior with exceptional combat training and equipment, often serving as personal guards to tribal leaders

385.name: Goblin Master Sniper
385.description: A goblin marksman of extraordinary skill who can hit targets with uncanny accuracy at extreme ranges

386.name: Goblin Necromancer
386.description: A goblin who has dedicated their life to mastering fire magic, capable of creating devastating firestorms

387.name: Goblin War Chief
387.description: A goblin of exceptional physical prowess and tactical intelligence who leads large war bands

388.name: Goblin Shadow Sorcerer
388.description: A goblin who has delved into forbidden magic, making pacts with dark entities to gain tremendous arcane power

389.name: Goblin King
389.description: A legendary goblin warrior of immense size and strength who has united multiple tribes under their brutal rule

390.name: Young Ogre
390.description: A juvenile ogre that hasn't reached full size but is still dangerous and unpredictable

391.name: Ogre Brute
391.description: A fully grown ogre that relies on brute strength and simple tactics to overpower opponents

392.name: Ogre Mystic
392.description: A rare ogre with innate magical abilities, often feared and respected within ogre communities

393.name: Orc Bruiser
393.description: A battle-hardened ogre that has learned to use its massive strength with tactical efficiency

394.name: Ogre Fire Shaman
394.description: An ogre that has developed control over fire magic, using it to enhance their tribe's weapons and intimidate enemies

395.name: Ogre Crusher
395.description: A massive ogre that wields oversized weapons designed to pulverize heavily armored opponents

396.name: Ogre Elemental Adept
396.description: An ogre spellcaster who has mastered both fire and ice magics, using them in devastating combinations

397.name: Ogre Warlord
397.description: A veteran ogre commander who leads raiding parties and has learned advanced combat techniques

398.name: Ogre Archmage
398.description: A highly intelligent ogre who has dedicated their life to arcane studies, mastering multiple schools of magic

399.name: Ogre Champion
399.description: An ogre of legendary size and strength who has never been defeated in combat, adorned with trophies from countless battles

400.name: Ogre Warlock King
400.description: A colossal ogre whose mastery of forbidden magics has granted them supreme power over their kind and terrible supernatural abilities

401.name: Tiamat, Mother of Chaos
401.description: The primordial dragon goddess of salt water, chaos and creation. Her five heads command all elements simultaneously, and her mere presence warps reality

402.name: Dragon of the Underworld Kur
402.description: The first mountain and primordial dragon who rules the underworld. His scales are made of bedrock, and his roar causes catastrophic earthquakes

403.name: Primal Ocean Dragon Abzu
403.description: The ancient dragon of the primordial freshwater ocean. He commands all water in existence and can flood entire continents with a thought

404.name: Storm Dragon King Enlil
404.description: The supreme dragon of air, storms and winds. He can create apocalyptic blizzards and freeze entire kingdoms in eternal ice

405.name: Dragon of Wisdom Enki
405.description: The all-knowing cosmic dragon of wisdom and creation. His mind-bending powers can control thoughts across dimensions and reshape reality

406.name: Dragon of Death Nergal
406.description: The immortal dragon lord of death and disease. His breath drains life force and corrupts souls, and his gaze alone can end existence

407.name: Celestial Dragon Anshar
407.description: The primordial sky dragon whose wings span galaxies. He controls cosmic forces and can summon meteors or bend starlight to his will

408.name: Supreme Dragon God Usumgallu
408.description: The ultimate dragon deity of all creation, whose body contains every element and force in existence. A being of incomprehensible cosmic power

409.name: Decaying Corpse
409.description: A freshly risen corpse that shambles mindlessly, still wearing tattered burial clothes

410.name: Rotting Skeleton
410.description: A brittle skeleton animated by weak necromantic magic, wielding remains of rusted weapons

411.name: Ghost Wisp
411.description: A minor spirit that failed to pass on, barely able to materialize enough to affect the physical world

412.name: Graveyard Shambler
412.description: A zombie that has climbed from its grave, still covered in soil and moving with awkward, jerky motions

413.name: Bone Warrior
413.description: A skeletal soldier that retains fragmentary combat training from its former life

414.name: Minor Shade
414.description: A shadowy echo of a departed soul that can briefly drain life force from the living

415.name: Plague Carrier
415.description: A zombie that spreads minor disease through scratches and bites, its flesh covered in pustules

416.name: Ancient Skeleton
416.description: A skeleton animated from ancient remains, crumbling but still dangerous

417.name: Apprentice's Remains
417.description: The reanimated body of a novice magic user who retains some minor spell capability

418.name: Fallen Warrior
418.description: The zombie of a slain fighter who still clutches a rusted weapon and moves with a soldier's gait

419.name: Undead Archer
419.description: A skeletal archer that retains enough muscle memory to loose arrows with modest accuracy

420.name: Lingering Spirit
420.description: The ghost of a person who died with unfinished business, able to manifest more strongly than lesser spirits

421.name: Festering Corpse
421.description: A zombie whose decomposing flesh hosts various infections that can weaken those it wounds

422.name: Forgotten Acolyte
422.description: The remains of a temple servant who can still call upon minor divine powers

423.name: Armored Remains
423.description: A skeleton still clad in partial armor that provides some protection against physical attacks

424.name: Graveyard Haunt
424.description: A ghost bound to a cemetery who can induce fear and drain vitality from trespassers

425.name: Reanimated Guard
425.description: A zombie that once served as a watchman or soldier, still instinctively patrolling and attacking intruders

426.name: Boneyard Hunter
426.description: A skeletal predator that stalks graveyards and catacombs, moving with surprising speed and coordination

427.name: Abandoned Novice
427.description: The ghost of a magic apprentice who died during a failed spell, retaining access to minor arcane abilities

428.name: Tomb Guardian
428.description: A larger, more dangerous zombie charged with protecting ancient burial sites, its flesh preserved through dark magic

429.name: Elven Scout
429.description: A forest guardian who patrols elven territories, skilled in stealth and precise archery

430.name: Elven Swordmaster
430.description: A disciplined warrior trained in the ancient elven blade arts, striking with elegant precision

431.name: Elven Frost Mage
431.description: A spellcaster who channels the winter aspects of nature, able to create freezing mists and ice shards

432.name: Elven Sharpshooter
432.description: An elite archer who can target vital points with uncanny precision and coat arrows with paralyzing tree sap

433.name: Elven Bladesinger
433.description: A warrior who combines martial prowess with magical song, weaving spells through elegant battle movements

434.name: Elven Flame Weaver
434.description: A mage who specializes in controlling fire with delicate precision, creating beautiful but deadly flame patterns

435.name: Elven Mystic
435.description: A spiritual elf who can commune with natural energies and drain vitality from opponents

436.name: Elven Ranger Captain
436.description: A veteran forest protector who leads scouting bands and has mastered advanced archery techniques

437.name: Elven Geomancer
437.description: A specialist who manipulates earth and stone, causing roots to entangle enemies or stones to rise from the ground

438.name: Elven Royal Guard
438.description: An elite warrior charged with protecting elven nobility, equipped with ancient enchanted weapons and armor

439.name: Elven High Mage
439.description: A powerful spellcaster who has studied magic for centuries, able to weave multiple spells simultaneously

440.name: Bandit Grunt
440.description: A common thug who relies on brute force and intimidation to rob travelers on lonely roads

441.name: Bandit Archer
441.description: A skilled marksman who prefers to strike from a distance before enemies can close in

442.name: Bandit Rogue
442.description: A swift and nimble cutpurse who specializes in quick strikes and stealing valuables

443.name: Bandit Mage
443.description: A renegade spellcaster who uses destructive magic to support the band's ambushes

444.name: Bandit Assassin
444.description: A deadly killer who specializes in eliminating high-value targets with poisoned weapons

445.name: Bandit Bard
445.description: A charismatic musician who uses performances to gather information and bolster allies

446.name: Bandit Pyromancer
446.description: A dangerous fire mage who delights in using devastating flames to create panic and destruction

447.name: Bandit Scout
447.description: A stealthy tracker who specializes in reconnaissance and setting up ambush points

448.name: Bandit Crossbowman
448.description: A specialized ranged fighter who uses heavy crossbows capable of piercing light armor

449.name: Bandit Chief
449.description: The ruthless leader of the bandit gang, feared for both strategic cunning and combat prowess

450.name: Bandit Cleric
450.description: A fallen priest who now uses divine magic to heal fellow bandits and curse their victims

451.name: The Surgeon
451.description: A methodical killer who dissects victims with surgical precision and collects specific organs as trophies

452.name: The Viper
452.description: A sinister poisoner who targets the wealthy and powerful, using exotic venoms that leave no trace

453.name: The Puppeteer
453.description: A deranged illusionist who mentally breaks victims before manipulating them into harming others or themselves

454.name: The Cremator
454.description: A pyromaniac who burns victims alive and collects charred remains as mementos of the 'purification'<Char:$FlameMagus

455.name: The Scarlet Judge
455.description: A self-appointed executioner who targets those he deems 'impure,' leaving elaborate religious symbolism at crime scenes

456.name: The Phantom
456.description: A silent killer who appears out of nowhere, never leaving evidence or witnesses behind

457.name: The Frozen Lady
457.description: A beautiful sorceress who freezes victims solid before shattering them into artistic arrangements

458.name: The Dreamweaver
458.description: A psychic murderer who enters victims' dreams, causing fatal terror as nightmares manifest in reality

459.name: The Taxidermist
459.description: A collector who preserves victims in lifelike poses, creating a macabre gallery of the deceased

460.name: The Blood Countess
460.description: A noblewoman who bathes in victims' blood, believing it preserves her youth and beauty

461.name: Acid Bombardier
461.description: A massive ant that can spray concentrated acid capable of dissolving armor and flesh alike

462.name: Engorged Tick Swarm
462.description: A writhing mass of bloodsucking parasites that drain vitality with each bite, growing larger as they feed

463.name: Assassin Wasp
463.description: A predatory wasp with precision stingers that target vital points, causing paralysis before injecting eggs into still-living hosts

464.name: Hivemind Termite
464.description: A colony of termites that function as a single entity, capable of rearranging into humanoid shapes and communicating telepathically

465.name: Aquatic Mantis
465.description: A massive mantis adapted to underwater hunting, using hypnotic patterns on its wings to mesmerize prey before striking

466.name: Blood Widow
466.description: A giant spider that spins webs infused with a psychotropic toxin, causing nightmarish hallucinations before it consumes its victims

467.name: Frost Scarab
467.description: An ancient beetle with a crystalline carapace that generates an aura of extreme cold, freezing everything in its vicinity

468.name: Magma Centipede
468.description: A segmented predator that burrows through volcanic rock, its body glowing with internal heat that melts metal on contact

469.name: Mind Flayer Moth
469.description: A massive moth whose wing patterns induce psychic paralysis, allowing it to feed on the thoughts and memories of its victims

470.name: Luminous Locust King
470.description: The intelligent ruler of a devastating locust swarm, capable of coordinating complex attacks and emitting blinding pulses of light

471.name: Field Mouse
471.description: A tiny rodent scurrying through the underbrush, more startled by adventurers than dangerous

472.name: Garden Frog
472.description: A small amphibian that hops away from danger, occasionally letting out a startling croak

473.name: Curious Rabbit
473.description: A timid rabbit with twitching ears that flees at the first sign of danger

474.name: Lazy Cat
474.description: A domesticated feline that seems more interested in napping than fighting

475.name: Tiny Chick
475.description: A fluffy baby bird that chirps loudly when approached

476.name: Buzzing Bumblebee
476.description: A plump bee buzzing from flower to flower, only stinging when truly threatened

477.name: Slow Turtle
477.description: A peaceful reptile that withdraws into its shell when disturbed

478.name: Ladybug
478.description: A small spotted beetle that crawls on plants and occasionally takes flight

479.name: Squirrel
479.description: A quick, nimble rodent that gathers nuts and scurries up trees at the first sign of trouble

480.name: Earthworm
480.description: A harmless wriggling worm that burrows through soil, beneficial for gardens but not much else

481.name: Quacking Duck
481.description: A waddling waterfowl that makes a noisy fuss when approached

482.name: Mole
482.description: A burrowing mammal with poor eyesight that rarely emerges from its underground tunnels

483.name: Blue Jay
483.description: A colorful bird known for its sharp calls and territorial displays

484.name: Skunk
484.description: A small mammal with distinctive black and white markings, known for its powerful odor defense

485.name: Grasshopper
485.description: A jumping insect that blends into grassy areas and makes chirping sounds

486.name: Trickster Imp
486.description: A mischievous minor demon that distracts enemies with illusions while stealing their belongings

487.name: Shadow Stalker
487.description: A demonic entity that can merge with shadows and strike from unexpected angles

488.name: Frost Succubus
488.description: A seductive demoness who drains life force through a kiss while gradually freezing victims solid

489.name: Nightmare Weaver
489.description: A demon that infiltrates dreams and manifests fears as temporary physical entities

490.name: Ember Fiend
490.description: A minor fire demon that can ignite its own body, detonating in a burst of flame when defeated

491.name: Mind Leech
491.description: A parasitic demon that attaches to a host's head, feeding on memories and implanting false ones

492.name: Blood Mimic
492.description: A shapeshifting demon that impersonates wounded allies to lure in rescuers before attacking

493.name: Venom Devil
493.description: A toxic demon whose strikes inject venom that initially boosts strength before causing paralysis

494.name: Soul Merchant
494.description: A cunning demonic trader who offers tempting deals that always come with hidden, terrible costs

495.name: Mirror Fiend
495.description: A demon that can copy the appearance and one ability of any opponent it faces

496.name: Frost Deciever
496.description: A demonic entity that appears helpless and wounded until approached, then unleashes freezing magic

497.name: Gravel Imp
497.description: A earth demon that can burrow through solid stone and create sinkholes to trap unwary adventurers

498.name: Discord Demon
498.description: A manipulative fiend that creates illusions to turn allies against each other through misunderstandings

499.name: Soul Harvester
499.description: A calculating demon that lures adventurers into traps using the voices of their lost loved ones

500.name: Iron Sentinel
500.description: A heavily armored knight who specializes in shield techniques and defensive formations

501.name: Radiant Defender
501.description: A holy knight whose blessed armor shines with divine light, resistant to dark magic and corruption

502.name: Royal Justicar
502.description: An elite knight who serves as judge, jury, and executioner, wielding a massive blade of judgment

503.name: Frost Knight
503.description: A knight whose armor is permanently frozen, creating an aura of extreme cold that slows attackers

504.name: Molten Guardian
504.description: A knight whose armor is supernaturally heated, burning anything that comes in contact with it

505.name: Tidal Warden
505.description: A knight whose enchanted armor constantly flows with water, making physical attacks slide off its surface

506.name: Stone Bulwark
506.description: A knight whose armor is fused with solid stone, making it nearly impervious to physical attacks

507.name: Celestial Protector
507.description: A knight blessed by celestial powers, whose armor reflects both physical and magical attacks

508.name: Mind Shield
508.description: A knight trained to resist mental intrusion, whose armor has been enchanted to repel psychic attacks

509.name: Dusk Commander
509.description: A legendary knight commander whose ancient armor is resistant to all forms of damage through forgotten enchantments

510.name: Tide Crab
510.description: A small but tenacious crustacean with powerful pincers that can cut through fishing nets

511.name: Coral Guardian
511.description: A humanoid creature covered in sharp coral growths that can regenerate damaged parts of its body

512.name: Trident Hunter
512.description: A mer-warrior who wields a barbed trident that can pierce even the thickest scales

513.name: Deep Frost Eel
513.description: A massive eel from the coldest ocean depths that can freeze water around itself to create protective barriers

514.name: Abyssal Horror
514.description: A shapeless entity from the ocean depths that can engulf victims whole and digest them within its amorphous body

515.name: Siren Enchantress
515.description: A beautiful yet deadly sea witch whose hypnotic songs can control the minds of even the strongest-willed sailors

516.name: Luminous Angler

530.description: A secretive fae being that can enter dreams, altering them or planting suggestions that persist into waking life

542.name: Security Bot

544.name: Cryo Drone
544.description: A specialized robot that can rapidly lower temperatures to freeze targets or create barriers of ice

545.name: Holographic Decoy

546.name: Assault Mech
546.description: A humanoid combat robot equipped with targeting systems and reinforced armor plating

547.name: Toxic Sprayer
547.description: A specialized robot designed to neutralize biological threats by dispensing corrosive chemicals

548.name: Photon Defender
548.description: A guardian robot that can generate hardlight shields and focused energy beams

549.name: Neural Interface
549.description: A sophisticated AI system that can connect to and manipulate the minds of those nearby

551.description: A massive drilling machine capable of causing localized earthquakes and burrowing through solid rock

552.description: A towering war machine equipped with plasma cannons and reinforced heat-resistant plating

553.name: Radiant Colossus
553.description: A holy-infused automaton powered by divine technology, able to channel sacred energy into devastating attacks

554.name: Quantum Intellect
554.description: A superintelligent AI system housed in a heavily defended mainframe, capable of calculating and exploiting the probabilities of multiple futures

557.description: A crusted arachnid whose tail injects neurotoxin, paralyzing prey with a single sting.

558.name: Marsh Wraith
558.description: A hungering specter of mist and rot, it drags victims beneath fetid water

559.name: Bog Elemental
559.description: A shifting mass of muck and roots, it engulfs intruders in sticky, suffocating grasp.

561.name: Miasma Lantern

562.name: Fungal Snapjaw

564.description: A grinning stone effigy that booms with laughter and shatters the swamp floor.

565.name: Grave Monarch
565.description: Sovereign of forgotten catacombs whose sceptre delivers instant death.

566.name: Marrow Archmage
566.description: A skeletal sorcerer who bends mortality and time alike.

567.name: Ossuary Colossus

568.description: Stands eternal vigil over its lich master’s soul-jar, striking with cursed halberd.

570.name: Gale Sentinel

571.name: Tempest Djinn

572.name: Storm Roc
572.description: A colossal bird whose wingbeats birth sand-laced cyclones.

574.name: Stratos Sovereign

575.name: Reef Guppy
575.description: A tiny, brightly-striped fish that nibbles on algae and bolts at the first sign of danger.

576.name: Sardine School

578.name: Reef Shark

580.name: Abyssal Pixie
580.description: A wing-torn pixie steeped in nightmare essence; its laughter erodes sanity.

581.description: Vines ooze brim-sap that melts armour; flowers burst into flame on contact.

582.name: Blight Sylph
582.description: Carries plague spores on burning gales; its giggle sounds like crackling wood.

583.name: Inferno Pooka
583.description: A shapeshifting steed wreathed in balefire; hoofbeats leave glassed earth.

584.description: Matriarch of the Unseelie host; her whisper remakes reality as a cruel jest.

588.name: Cerberus Sentinel

589.name: Brimstone Behemutt
589.description: A colossal, vaguely canine fiend whose very footsteps ignite the ground.

590.name: Rubber Reality Blob

591.name: Wandering Eyeball

592.name: Inside-Out Critter

594.name: Pocket-Dimension Imp

595.name: Fluxling Furret
595.description: A darting mote of prismatic energy that flickers in and out of phase with reality.

596.name: Gloomwurm

597.name: Shardmaw

598.name: Spineshade
598.description: A lurking horror wreathed in bone needles; every strike implants barbs that fester with dark magic.

599.name: Velocicorn
599.description: A lightning-swift ungulate crowned with a spiralled horn whose charge rips the air itself.

600.name: Savage Berserker
600.description: A frenzied barbarian who fights with reckless abandon

601.name: Bloodaxe Raider
601.description: Wields twin axes in a whirlwind of gore-splattered blows

603.name: Skullcrusher Brute

608.name: Filth Fiend

609.name: Landfill Leviathan
609.description: A towering mass of compressed junk and bone fragments held together by foul sorcery.

610.name: Rotvulture
610.description: A scavenger bird swollen on rotting refuse; its foul breath carries disease.

611.name: Scrapforged
611.description: A hulking golem cobbled together from rusted armour and discarded engines.

613.name: Plague Heap
613.description: A towering mass of rotted meat, bones and refuse held together by pestilent fumes.

615.name: Obsidian Visionary
615.description: A crystal-eyed seer whose dark prophecies rain shards of volcanic glass.

616.name: Dream Serpent High Priest

619.name: Quetzalcoatl Channeler
619.description: A winged serpent-mage that calls down lightning feathers to incinerate the impure.

620.name: Whispering Wraith

621.name: Veiled Phantasm
621.description: A shifting silhouette that cloaks itself in silence and spores

627.name: Totemic Sprout

628.name: Totem Initiate

631.description: A seasoned totem caster balancing offense and protection

688.description: A security robot repurposed by rogue AI to hunt intruders.

689.description: A powerful AI core broadcasting its control over lesser machines.

691.description: The ultimate form of rogue AI, a singularity that transcends physical limits.

698.description: A carrion crawler slathered in swamp sludge, its claws tear muscle like paper.

699.name: Gravebound Revenant
699.description: A reanimated knight in tarnished armor, its blade drips with cursed ichor.

701.description: A skeletal beast whose ear-splitting cry fractures spirit and skull alike.

702.description: A skeletal monstrosity gnawing on marrow, it spits shards of fractured bone.

703.description: A strict dominator who wields raw willpower and chains to subdue victims

704.name: Pain Enthusiast

705.name: Chainbound Fury
705.description: A cruel arachnid that uses chains and webbing to bind and break prey

706.name: Silken Enchantress
706.description: A temptress who lures victims into silk traps and indulges in exquisite pain

708.name: Goblin Mosh Lord
708.description: A frenzy leader who commands the pit with brutal riffs and thunderous beats

709.name: Goblin Shrieker
709.description: A shrieking fanatic whose ear-splitting screams can shatter courage

710.name: Goblin Head
710.description: A raging head who headbangs with bone-crushing force

711.name: Goblin Riot Caster
711.description: A sonic sorcerer who unleashes chaotic blasts to fuel the uprising

712.name: Goblin Metal Warlord
712.description: The ultimate warlord who leads the black metal horde with iron resolve

713.name: Shellbreaker Bulwark

714.name: Coralic Warcaster
714.description: A sea turtle infused with storm magic, calling down crushing waves and vortexes

715.name: Acidic Tidecaller

719.name: Infernal Pyromancer
719.description: A hellspawn sorcerer who bathes foes in unquenchable flames and searing ash

721.name: Obsidian Wraith
721.description: A shadowy specter clad in volcanic glass, it ensnares minds and silences all hope

722.name: Earthen Colossus
722.description: A gargantuan golem of bedrock and ore, it quakes the earth and sends razor shards flying

724.description: A demonic scribe who channels searing flames into forbidden tomes, incinerating knowledge and flesh alike

726.name: Abyssal Siren

727.description: A molten sentinel forged in rock and flame, protecting sacred forges with impenetrable stone plating

732.name: Arcane Archmage

733.name: Halo Acolyte
733.description: A novice of the divine light, wielding basic prayers and protective auras

734.name: Luminous Deacon

738.name: Mimic shaped box
738.description: A warped canvas inhabited by chaotic pigments that twist forms into nightmarish parodies.

739.description: A legendary beast whose mane and tail spin with chaotic hues, its roar warping reality in a spectrum of fear.
