756.name: Tunneling Mole
756.description: A feral digger that bursts from below, tripping foes with a seismic charge.

757.name: Sand Cobra
757.description: A venomous serpent of the dunes, striking with deadly precision and injecting potent toxins.

758.name: Polar Bear
758.description: A massive bear of the frozen wastes, its crushing paws and icy breath punish any who dare approach.

759.name: Rancorous Bull
759.description: A furious bull with iron-hard horns, goring and trampling its foes in a relentless charge.

760.name: Ominous Raven
760.description: A sleek black bird whose chilling cry foretells doom; it blinds prey with a cloud of enchanted dust.

761.name: Bald Eagle
761.description: A regal raptor that dives at break-neck speed, shredding armor with its talons and piercing cry.

762.name: Dune Fang
762.description: A venom-soaked serpent of the dunes, its fangs drip a paralytic toxin that cripples prey.

763.name: Frostback Ursid
763.description: A massive cave bear whose icy fur shields it from harm as it rends flesh with chilling mauls.

764.name: Ironhoof Charger
764.description: A furious bull with iron-like horns, battering foes senseless in a brutal charge.

765.name: Nightwisp
765.description: A shadowy raven whose piercing screech blinds prey before a silent, deadly descent.

766.name: Carrion Stalker
766.description: A scavenging beast drawn to death’s scent, pouncing upon carrion with razor-sharp claws.

767.name: Psionic Fenbeast
767.description: A warped creature of twisted thought, it shatters minds with psychic assaults and hallucinatory dust.

768.name: Chromatic Tick
768.description: Its iridescent shell oozes a contagion that jumps targets, while its neon flurry blinds foes in a blink.

769.name: Guttural Maggotus
769.description: This bloated burrower erupts in writhing swarms of spores, leaving victims wracked with confusion and rot.

770.name: Sporeburst Myconid
770.description: A towering fungus whose rupturing cap spews clouds of hallucinogenic spores, fracturing reality for all.

771.name: Sonic Molten Drakebat
771.description: A hellish flyer forged in magma and sound, its screech ignites the air before it engulfs prey in molten shards.

772.name: Moonlit Wendigo
772.description: A gaunt forest spirit that stalks under moonlight, its hollow eyes striking terror into any who cross its path.

773.name: Rotwood Entangler
773.description: A warped tree guardian whose gnarled roots lash out to ensnare unwary travelers in the undergrowth.

774.name: Bloodbell Cow
774.description: A once-docile farm beast twisted by dark magics, its mournful bell heralding doom rather than dawn.

775.name: Marsh Murkweb
775.description: A colossal swamp spider that drapes its webs across the treeline, ensnaring prey in murky waters.

776.name: Rabid Coyote
776.description: A coyote driven mad by hunger, it swarms foes with claw and fang in savage frenzy.

777.name: Mothshade Stalker
777.description: A nocturnal winged horror whose hypnotic flutter lulls victims before draining their life essence.

778.name: Chupacabra Fiend
778.description: A bloodthirsty predator that preys on livestock, leaving only drained husks in its wake.

779.name: Lake Lurker Serpent
779.description: A serpentine cryptid that drags unwary swimmers beneath dark waters with crushing coils.

780.name: Gatorghast Horror
780.description: A swamp-dwelling leviathan with bone-crushing jaws and a hunger for flesh.

781.name: Flatwood Sentinel
781.description: A towering tree-like guardian of the woods, it ensnares intruders with gnarled limbs.

782.name: Barbed Manticore
782.description: A fearsome cryptid with the body of a lion and a venomous, barbed tail strike that rends armor and flesh alike.

783.name: Petrifying Gorgon
783.description: A serpentine matriarch whose gaze turns flesh to stone, and whose venomous hair lashes strike with uncanny precision.

784.name: Abyssal Leviathan
784.description: A gargantuan sea serpent from the deepest trenches, it crushes hulls with its coils and unleashes crushing tidal blasts.

785.name: Timeworn Owlbear
785.description: An ageless ursine beast with barbed feathers and echoing screeches that distort the flow of time around its prey.

786.name: Majestic Griffon
786.description: A noble sky-king with razor talons and a deafening roar that summons storm winds to buffet its foes.

787.name: Haunting Scarecrow
787.description: An eldritch scarecrow animated by restless spirits, its stitched brim unleashes poltergeist gusts that shred flesh.

788.name: Spectral Wardstone
788.description: A rune-carved stone imbued with a trapped spirit; its spectral lantern beams disorient foes and summon invisible hands.

789.name: Phantom Marionette
789.description: A marionette of splintered wood haunted by a child’s laughter, strings weaving phantom limbs to choke the living.

790.name: Rattling Remains
790.description: Bones of the long-dead animated by malevolent force, each joint’s rattle echoes as spectral claws rip at flesh.

791.name: Will-O-’-Wisp Lamp
791.description: An abandoned oil lamp possessed by a wandering spirit, its ghostly glow guides victims into deadly illusions.

792.name: Terraclaw Tortoise
792.description: A hulking tortoise whose shell hardens like stone, crushing foes with earth-shaking stomps.

793.name: Pyroshell Tortoise
793.description: A magma-infused tortoise whose blazing shell immolates anything that dares approach.

794.name: Frostback Tortoise
794.description: An ice-clad tortoise whose frozen shell shatters bones with glacial force.

795.name: Stormshell Tortoise
795.description: A storm-charged tortoise crackling with lightning, unleashing thunderous shell strikes.

796.name: Tidalcarapace Tortoise
796.description: A tidal tortoise commanding ocean currents, flooding foes with wave-crushing shell bashes.

797.name: Steelshell Tortoise
797.description: A living steel tortoise whose indestructible shell bombards enemies with metallic quakes.

798.name: Galeshell Tortoise
798.description: A wind-swept tortoise riding gale-force gusts, striking with cyclonic shell assaults.

799.name: Dawnshell Tortoise
799.description: A holy tortoise blessed by dawn’s light, its divine shell smites evil with radiant force.

800.name: Nightcurse Tortoise
800.description: A blighted tortoise imbued with dark curses, its malevolent shell drains life with each blow.

801.name: Giant Rat
801.description: A common vermin with sharp teeth and twitchy reflexes, often found scavenging in sewers.

802.name: Goblin Grunt
802.description: A crude footsoldier of goblin tribes, wielding makeshift weapons and eager for easy prey.

803.name: Goblin Marksman
803.description: A nimble goblin marksman, picking off foes from a distance with poisoned arrows.

804.name: Acid Ant
804.description: A small insect that sprays a virulent acid from its mandibles, dissolving armor.

805.name: Death Axolotl
805.description: Azolotl that strikes with corrosive slime and can knock foes off balance.

806.name: Magma Ant
806.description: A volcanic insect whose molten mandibles weld flesh to armor in a single bite.

807.name: Fire Centipede
807.description: A scuttling inferno with dozens of burning legs, it scorches tunnels in its path.

808.name: Molten Efreeti
808.description: : A blazing elemental lord that hurls lava bolts and turns terrain to slag.

809.name: Blazing Inferno Elemental
809.description: A towering conflagration given sentience, it sears all in its path.

810.name: Obsidian Hellhound
810.description: A fiendish canine wreathed in molten obsidian, its snarls ignite the air.

811.name: Crimson Magma Drake
811.description: A feral dragon born of magma flows, its molten breath can melt steel.

812.name: Searing Magma Wyrm
812.description: A lithe draconian serpent wreathed in molten rock, its fiery maw incinerates all in its path.

813.name: Basaltstone Golem
813.description: A hulking construct of fused basalt and brimstone, it slams the earth with cataclysmic force.

814.name: Emberback Hellscorpion
814.description: A vicious arachnid whose molten carapace and venomous sting unleash waves of scorching pain.

815.name: Pyroclast Phoenix
815.description: A legendary avian wreathed in perpetual flame, reborn in eruptions of pure fire and ash.

816.name: Ophanim Judicator
816.description: A wheel of divine retribution, its many eyes judge souls with unwavering gaze.

817.name: Seraph of the Seventh Veil
817.description: A six-winged blaze of righteous fury, veiled in searing light and veined with judgment.

818.name: Cherubic Host-Alpha
818.description: A chorus of infant mouths and eyes, their hymns can fell the unworthy in a storm of holiness.

819.name: Dominion of the Flame
819.description: A tribunal of living embers, their righteous flames purify evil with scalding decree.

820.name: Archangel Mortifier
820.description: The harbinger of divine extinction, its mere presence unravels corruption in holy radiance.

821.name: Novice Shaolin Acolyte
821.description: A novice monk refining basic strikes and stances with unwavering focus.

822.name: Iron Palm Disciple
822.description: A dedicated disciple whose iron-clad palms shatter defenses and deliver thunderous blows.

823.name: Zen Fist Master
823.description: A serene master channeling inner calm into devastating Dragon Fist strikes and impenetrable defense.

824.name: Bogscale Hunter
824.description: A stealthy lizardfolk stalking the misty bogs, its razor-sharp claws and toxic spit making it a deadly ambush predator.

825.name: Marshjaw Stalker
825.description: A hulking lizardfolk with mottled green scales, it prowls marsh edges and ambushes prey with its venom-laced fangs.

826.name: Fenclaw Brute
826.description: A towering lizardfolk warlord commanding swamp tribes, its massive claws rend armor and its toxin-coated hide wards off attackers.

827.name: Haunted Mannequin
827.description: A life‐size wooden dummy possessed by an unseen force, its joints creak as it advances on prey.

828.name: Twisted Marionette
828.description: A porcelain doll rigged with sinewy strings, its broad grin hides rows of serrated teeth.

829.name: Stringbound Abomination
829.description: A towering horror of splintered limbs and tangled cords, able to ensnare victims in unbreakable bonds.

830.name: Bioluminescent Caveworm
830.description: A phosphorescent earthworm that illuminates caverns before crushing intruders under its bulk.

831.name: Crystalline Skulker
831.description: A glass-encrusted stalker whose prismatic hide refracts light into lethal lasers.

832.name: Echo Maw
832.description: A cavernous beast whose gaping throat emits concussive screams that shatter stone.

833.name: Bog Hatchling
833.description: A tiny croaking amphibian barely bigger than a pebble<br

834.name: Marsh Skulk
834.description: A warty humanoid that skulks among reeds

835.name: Quagmire Creeper
835.description: A leech-like wretch that drags victims into sludge

836.name: Mire Spider
836.description: A venomous arachnid weaving webs across murky pools

837.name: Bog Mutant
837.description: A twisted mass of moss and bone, oozing toxic slime

838.name: Swamp Leech Queen
838.description: A colossal leech that can drain life in a single bite

840.name: Mire Hydra
840.description: A multi-headed beast spewing venomous mist

841.name: Bog Golem
841.description: An animated construct of mud and bone

842.name: Swamp Leviathan
842.description: A colossal monstrosity that shakes the marsh with each step

843.name: Mire Dragon
843.description: The apex predator of the swamp, breathing corrosive fog

844.name: Wooden Flower
844.description: A tiny sapling animated by forest magic, it lashes out with thorny tendrils

845.name: Barkhide Bruiser
845.description: A young arboreal warrior whose bark-encrusted hide absorbs blows

846.name: Timberwood Shaman
846.description: A forest mystic who channels wood spirits to curse and bind foes

847.name: Sylvan Barkstalker
847.description: A silent hunter of the undergrowth, its bark-patterned skin makes it nearly invisible

848.name: Elderwood Guardian
848.description: An ancient treant whose gnarled limbs crush intruders and whose branches summon vines

849.name: Armored Beaver
849.description: A river rodent in iron-like pelt, it rams foes with sod-burrowing ferocity.

850.name: Primal Kangaroo
850.description: A savage hopper with sinewy legs, it delivers bone-crushing kicks and pummels with gnashing jaws.

851.name: Night Raccoon
851.description: A bandit-masked scavenger that raids camps under moonlight, pilfering treasures and spreading plague.

853.name: Spiny Sprinter
853.description: A swift burrower whose burst of spines deters any would-be attacker.

854.name: Sea Turtle
854.description: Encased in an impenetrable shell, it rams foes with surprising force.

855.name: Soldier Ant Colony
855.description: A swarming mass that overwhelms foes with coordinated pincers.

856.name: Umber Moth Swarm
856.description: A cloud of fluttering wings that disorients with hallucinogenic dust.

857.name: Wise Owl
857.description: A silent flier that strikes from above with talons honed by moonlight.

858.name: Ominous Raven Murder
858.description: A cadre of dark-feathered hunters that dive in unison, sowing panic.

859.name: Giant Slithering Snail
859.description: A lumbering behemoth that leaves an acidic trail and withstands any blow.

860.name: Ochre Jelly Swarm
860.description: A shifting mass of stinging pseudopods that engulfs any who draw near.

862.name: Emerald Ooze
862.description: A verdant slime that secretes toxins, slowly dissolving anything it touches.

863.name: Azure Slime
863.description: A watery blob that absorbs moisture from foes, leaving them parched and weak.

864.name: Crimson Jelly
864.description: A blood-red ooze that feeds on life force, growing stronger with each victim.

865.name: Golden Pudding
865.description: A rare metallic slime that gleams with inner light and deflects most attacks.

866.name: Void Gel
866.description: A shadowy mass that absorbs light and drains the essence of reality itself.

867.name: Molten Slag
867.description: A superheated blob of magma that melts armor and sears flesh on contact.

868.name: Frost Slime
868.description: A frozen mass that chills to the bone, slowing movement with icy touch.

869.name: Thunder Blob
869.description: An electrically charged ooze that sparks and crackles, stunning prey with lightning.

870.name: King Slime
870.description: A colossal slime monarch that commands lesser oozes and splits when damaged.

871.name: Toxic Sludge
871.description: A noxious puddle that emits poisonous fumes, corroding everything nearby.

872.name: Rainbow Slime
872.description: A prismatic ooze that shifts between elements, adapting to any threat.

873.name: Sand Slime
873.description: A grainy mass that blinds foes with sand particles and desiccates on touch.

874.name: Seeing Slime
874.description: An ocular ooze with dozens of eyes that paralyzes prey with its terrifying gaze.

875.name: Mud Slime
875.description: A muddy blob that slows movement and hardens into crushing weight.

876.name: Pumpkin Slime
876.description: A festive gourd-shaped ooze that terrorizes with jack-o'-lantern grins and fiery breath.

877.name: Pink Slime
877.description: A sweet-smelling blob that lulls victims into complacency before dissolving them.

878.name: Grotesque Slime
878.description: A nightmarish amalgamation of absorbed victims, writhing with half-digested remains.

879.name: Green Slime
879.description: A common forest slime that feeds on vegetation and unwary travelers.

880.name: Grass Slime
880.description: A camouflaged meadow dweller that entangles prey with grassy pseudopods.

881.name: Shadow Bat
881.description: A vampiric bat fused with dark slime, draining life force while spreading shadowy corruption.

882.name: Crimson Fish
882.description: A massive fish mutated by blood magic, its pincers can crush armor and drain vitality.

883.name: Corrupted Bioslave
883.description: A twisted amalgamation of plant and flesh, enslaved by dark magic to serve as a toxic guardian.

884.name: Spectral Songbird
884.description: A ghostly avian that lures victims with haunting melodies before draining their sanity.

885.name: Flying Pig
885.description: A swarm of scavenger birds that attack in coordinated dives, pecking eyes and exposed flesh.

886.name: Dust Devil Bird
886.description: Desert scavengers that create blinding sandstorms with their wings while pecking at disoriented prey.

887.name: Shadow Crawler
887.description: A shadowy insect that phases in and out of darkness, striking from blind spots.

888.name: Cursed Candle
888.description: A possessed candelabra that burns with unholy flame, spreading fear and burning souls.

889.name: Void Parasite Plant
889.description: A carnivorous plant infected by void energy, consuming both flesh and magical essence.

890.name: Abyssal Crab
890.description: A deep-sea crustacean touched by the abyss, its shell absorbs light and hope.

891.name: Grasping Shadow
891.description: A disembodied hand of pure darkness that emerges from shadows to strangle the unwary.

892.name: Umbral Basilisk
892.description: A spectral jellyfish that drifts through air as if swimming, paralyzing victims with ghostly tentacles.

893.name: Death's Head
893.description: A floating skull wreathed in dark energy, cursing those who meet its hollow gaze.

894.name: Void Desolator
894.description: A minotaur corrupted by void energy, absorbing light and slowly draining life from anything it touches.

895.name: Shadow Tortoise
895.description: A tortoise whose shell has absorbed centuries of darkness, reflecting curses back at attackers.

896.name: Creeping Shade
896.description: A shadow-infused turtle that creeps through darkness, ambushing prey with surprising speed.

897.name: Hollow Goat
897.description: A humanoid goat with a turtle-like shell, empty inside but filled with malevolent intent.

898.name: Tonno Dimensionale
898.description: A being that exists between dimensions, phasing in and out of reality to strike.

899.name: Blank Emergence
899.description: An entity from the void that shouldn't exist, its presence alone causes reality to fracture.

900.name: Blick
900.description: A cyclopean horror with a single eye that fires beams of pure entropy.

901.name: Em
901.description: A skeletal beast whose ear-splitting cry fractures spirit and skull alike.

902.name: Bubba
902.description: A humanoid shadow creature with a turtle-like shell, empty inside but filled with malevolent intent.

905.name: Meat Puppet Theater
905.description: A grotesque marionette made from sewn-together flesh of previous victims, performing eternal nightmares.

906.name: Whispering Door
906.description: A stone door embedded with the faces of the tormented, each mouth whispering different madness.

907.name: Memory Leech
907.description: A parasitic slug that feeds on memories, leaving victims with only their worst experiences.

908.name: Bone Orchestra
908.description: Multiple skeletons fused together, playing haunting melodies on instruments made from their own ribs.

909.name: Womb of Nightmares
909.description: A bloated mass that births twisted horrors from its many orifices, each spawn more disturbing than the last.

910.name: Inverted Angel
910.description: A celestial being turned inside-out, its wings are exposed sinew and its halo drips black ichor.

911.name: Foul Gouger
911.description: A sentient mass of despair that whispers the final thoughts of the damned, spreading existential dread.

912.name: Backwards Doll
912.description: A porcelain doll that ages backwards, speaking in reverse about futures that should never come to pass.

913.name: Fleshweaver Spider
913.description: A spider-human hybrid that weaves tapestries from living skin, keeping victims conscious during the process.

914.name: Totem of Sins
914.description: A reflective surface that shows victims their worst moments, driving them to self-destruction through guilt.

915.name: Hollow Mother
915.description: A maternal zombie whose chest cavity houses a swarm of infant undead that burst forth to attack.

917.name: Bleeding Statue
917.description: A stone effigy that weeps blood from every pore, the tears burning like acid and spreading plague.

918.name: Surgeon of Souls
918.description: A skeletal figure that performs 'operations' on living victims, claiming to cure their humanity.

919.name: Crying Tree
919.description: An ancient tree whose bark bears the faces of absorbed victims, all weeping tears of sap eternally.

920.name: Umbilical Strangler
920.description: A serpentine horror that connects to victims via fleshy tendrils, slowly draining their life essence.

921.name: Grief Collector
921.description: A floating mass of eyes that feeds on sorrow, each eye showing the final moments of loved ones.

922.name: Maternity Ward
922.description: A monstrous entity that mimics pregnant women, birthing abominations that call victims 'parent'.

923.name: Screaming Jar
923.description: A glass container filled with the anguished voices of the dead, their screams driving listeners insane.

924.name: Hunger Incarnate
924.description: A writhing mass of mouths and stomachs that can never be satisfied, consuming everything including itself.

925.name: Temporal Hornet
925.description: A hornet that feeds on time itself, aging victims rapidly while remaining eternally young.

926.name: Baptism Font
926.description: A holy font filled with acidic tears that baptizes victims into eternal suffering.

927.name: Identity Thief
927.description: A shapeshifter that steals not just appearance but memories, leaving victims as empty shells.

928.name: Orphanage Warden
928.description: A bureaucratic nightmare that adopts victims into eternal childhood, never letting them grow or leave.

929.name: Lullaby Wraith
929.description: A ghostly caretaker that sings victims to sleep, then harvests their dreams for sustenance.

930.name: Puppet Master's Corpse
930.description: A deceased puppeteer whose strings still control his rotting body, seeking new marionettes from the living.

931.name: Feast of Famine
931.description: A massive entity that appears as a banquet table, but the food is made from its own constantly regenerating flesh.

932.name: Abortion Mimic
932.description: A medical facility mimic that offers false hope before consuming both mother and unborn child.

933.name: Childhood's End
933.description: A doll that forces adults to relive their most traumatic childhood memories until they break completely.

934.name: Emotional Leech
934.description: A parasitic slug that feeds exclusively on happiness, leaving victims in permanent despair.

936.name: Geometry Devourer
936.description: A shapeshifting mass that exists in seventeen dimensions simultaneously, consuming angles and vertices.

937.name: Inverted Hunger
937.description: A creature that feeds by being consumed, growing larger the more it is devoured.

938.name: Temporal Barnacle
938.description: A crystalline parasite that attaches to moments instead of hosts, feeding on causality itself.

939.name: Probability Spider
939.description: An arachnid that weaves webs from quantum uncertainty, trapping victims in potential realities.

940.name: Breathing Building
940.description: An architectural entity whose walls inhale visitors and whose rooms digest them slowly over centuries.

941.name: Mathematics Eater
941.description: A spherical paradox that consumes abstract concepts, leaving gaps in reality where numbers once existed.

942.name: Inside-Out Whale
942.description: A cetacean with its organs on the outside and void where its interior should be, swimming through solid matter.

943.name: Mirror Basher
943.description: A reflective knight that shows infinite reflections of itself, each reflection slightly more wrong than the last.

944.name: Gravity Worm
944.description: A serpentine entity that tunnels through spacetime itself, leaving holes in reality behind it.

945.name: Color Out of Sound
945.description: A living synesthesia that exists as both wavelength and frequency, seen by the deaf and heard by the blind.

946.name: Flesh Calculator
946.description: A biological computer made of interwoven muscles that processes emotions as mathematical equations.

947.name: Backwards Tree
947.description: A tree that grows downward into the sky, its roots in clouds and branches burrowing through earth.

948.name: Thought Parasite
948.description: An invisible tick that feeds on synapses, becoming more real the more it's thought about.

949.name: Sentient Wound
949.description: A living injury that exists independently of any body, seeking hosts to inhabit and expand within.

950.name: Non-Euclidean Crab
950.description: A crustacean whose geometry defies comprehension, with claws that pinch through folded space.

951.name: Vorthak the Membrane-Ripper
951.description: The Weaver of Dimensional Wounds - An alien god that tears holes between realities with its crystalline appendages.

952.name: Yith'oghra the Consensus-Breaker
952.description: The Unraveler of Truth - A deity that destroys shared reality by making contradictions simultaneously true.

953.name: Mor'dun the Flesh-Architect
953.description: The Constructor of Living Cities - An ancient god that builds sentient metropolises from the bones of civilizations.

954.name: Qel'thuzad the Memory-Eater
954.description: The Librarian of Forgotten Names - A psychic parasite god that devours entire histories, leaving only vague impressions.

955.name: Nyth'aggoth the Concept-Corruptor
955.description: The Defiler of Pure Ideas - A cosmic entity that infects abstract concepts with malignant paradoxes.

956.name: Shal'thyss the Void-Surgeon
956.description: The Harvester of Soul-Essence - A seductive deity that performs spiritual vivisection on willing victims.

957.name: Gul'magoth the Time-Weaver
957.description: The Chronarch of Paradox - A temporal deity that knits impossible loops in causality's fabric.

958.name: Xoth'nagal the Dream-Plague
958.description: The Contagion of Sleeping Minds - A nightmare deity that spreads through collective unconscious, infecting dreams across worlds.

959.name: Vel'korthak the Reality-Breeder
959.description: The Spawner of Alternate Truths - A reality-manipulating god that births new universes from contradictions.

960.name: Zhoth'aggur the Silence-Weaver
960.description: The Architect of Absolute Quiet - The supreme void-god that devours sound, meaning, and existence itself, leaving only perfect emptiness.

961.name: Primordial Terror Rex
961.description: The apex predator of ancient epochs, a colossal tyrant whose roar splits mountains and whose jaws crush adamantine.

962.name: Colossal Mammoth King
962.description: An ice age patriarch whose tusks pierce the earth's crust and whose trumpeting summons primordial storms.

963.name: Titanic Cave Bear
963.description: A monstrous ursine giant whose claws carve stone and whose hibernation shakes continents awake.

964.name: Megalodon Prime
964.description: The ultimate oceanic predator, a prehistoric shark whose bite force reshapes coastlines and devours whales whole.

965.name: Thunder Lizard Colossus
965.description: A dragon of impossible proportions whose footsteps trigger earthquakes and whose tail sweeps forests bare.

966.name: Dire Saber-tooth Alpha
966.description: The pack leader of ice age killers, whose sabers pierce dragon scales and whose hunting cry freezes prey in terror.

967.name: Armored Rex Lord
967.description: A three-horned fortress of bone and muscle whose charge levels mountains and whose hide deflects meteor strikes.

968.name: Giant Terror Bird
968.description: A flightless nightmare whose beak shatters armor like glass and whose talons rake trenches in bedrock.

969.name: Primordial Dragon Turtle
969.description: An ancient leviathan whose shell is forged from glacier ice and whose breath flash-freezes entire armies.

970.name: Crawling Hand
970.description: A severed hand that skitters on its fingers, leaving bloody prints wherever it crawls.

971.name: Eyeball Slug
971.description: A gastropod with a giant unblinking eyeball for a head. Its gaze induces nausea.

972.name: Tooth Ratkin
972.description: A hairless rodent whose body is entirely covered in human molars instead of fur.

973.name: Backwards Bird
973.description: A raven with its head twisted completely backward. It flies in reverse and caws prophecies of the past.

974.name: Skin Balloon
974.description: An inflated sphere of stretched human skin that floats and deflates to attack with noxious gas.

976.name: Giggling Skull
976.description: A disembodied skull that floats and laughs maniacally at inappropriate moments.

977.name: Finger Worm
977.description: A serpentine creature composed entirely of stitched-together human fingers that wiggle independently.

978.name: Weeping Mask
978.description: A floating theatrical mask that constantly drips tears of black ichor from its eye holes.

979.name: Tongue Leech
979.description: A parasitic slug that resembles a human tongue. It whispers disturbing secrets as it feeds.

980.name: Pocket Watch Scarab
980.description: A mechanical beetle with clock gears for a body. It steals seconds from those it touches.

982.name: Baby Doll Head
982.description: A porcelain doll head that rolls on the ground, crying real tears and calling for its mother.

983.name: Tooth Fairy
983.description: A twisted fae creature that collects teeth by force, using pliers made of bone.

984.name: Rib Cage Crab
984.description: A crustacean that wears a human ribcage as its shell. The heart inside still beats faintly.

985.name: Eyeless Bat
985.description: A bat with smooth skin where its eyes should be. It navigates by screaming victims' names.

986.name: Cone Mimic
986.description: A mimic that disguises itself as a traffic cone. It digests prey from the inside out.

987.name: Whisper Wisp
987.description: A floating orb of pale light that speaks the last words of the deceased in their exact voices.

988.name: Hair Ball
988.description: A tangled mass of human hair from hundreds of different people. It moves like a tumbling tumbleweed.

989.name: Organ Grinder Monkey
989.description: A circus monkey that plays music on an instrument made from human organs. The melody induces vertigo.

990.name: Ink Blot Child
990.description: A shadowy child-shaped figure that appears to be drawn in dripping ink. It leaves stains that never wash out.

991.name: Razorback Boar
991.description: A massive wild boar with blade-like bristles along its spine. Its tusks can gore through iron.

992.name: Feral Hyena Pack
992.description: A cackling pack hunter with bone-crushing jaws. They laugh maniacally while tearing prey apart.

993.name: Spined Lizard
993.description: A desert reptile covered in venomous spines. Its tail whip can shatter bone.

994.name: Maned Terror Wolf
994.description: A wolf with a mane of razor-sharp quills. Its howl paralyzes smaller creatures with primal fear.

995.name: Horned Bear
995.description: A massive ursine with twisted horns growing from its skull. Its roar causes avalanches.

996.name: Saber Cat
996.description: A sleek predator with elongated fangs. It stalks silently and strikes with lethal precision.

997.name: Armored Purcupine
997.description: A beast covered in blade-like scales. When threatened, it curls into a spinning death ball.

998.name: Crushing Boa
998.description: A serpent thick as a tree trunk. Its coils crush steel armor and its scales deflect blades.

999.name: Bull Wyvern
999.description: A muscular wyvern with horns like battering rams. Its charge can topple stone walls.

1000.name: Monstrous Badger
1000.description: A ferocious burrowing beast with iron claws. It never retreats and fights to the death.

1001.name: Maleficent Ape
1001.description: The pack leader of jungle primates. Its deafening screech disorients prey and rallies its troop.

1002.name: Dire Pig
1002.description: A relentless predator with teeth that never stop growing. It can bring down prey ten times its size.

1003.name: Frost Raccoon
1003.description: A raccoon with razor-sharp icicle teeth. Its kicks leave frostbite.

1004.name: Snow Werewolf
1004.description: A pale werewolf that burrows through snow.

1005.name: Ice Lemming
1005.description: A small rodent that explodes into freezing shards when cornered. They travel in suicidal swarms.

1006.name: Tundra Crow
1006.description: A black bird with frost-covered feathers. It pecks out the eyes of frozen corpses.

1007.name: Arctic Fox
1007.description: A cunning white-furred predator with crystalline claws. It hunts silently across ice fields.

1008.name: Frozen Bat
1008.description: A bat encased in permafrost that somehow still lives. Its bite drains body heat.

1009.name: Ice Wolf Pup
1009.description: A young wolf with frost forming on its breath. Even as pups, they hunt in coordinated packs.

1010.name: Permafrost Beetle
1010.description: An insect with an ice-armored carapace. It freezes anything it touches.

1011.name: Seal Pup
1011.description: A young arctic seal with sharp teeth. Surprisingly aggressive when defending territory.

1012.name: Blizzard Owl
1012.description: A snow-white predatory bird with talons that radiate cold. It hunts during whiteouts.

1013.name: Glacier Crab
1013.description: A crustacean with a shell of blue ice. Its claws can snap frozen wood.

1014.name: Frost Spider
1014.description: An arachnid that weaves webs from frozen moisture. Prey freezes solid upon contact.

1015.name: Young Yeti
1015.description: A juvenile snow ape with ice-covered fur. Even young, it possesses terrible strength.

1016.name: Ice Kangaroo
1016.description: A translucent kangaroo made of living ice. Its punches injects freezing venom that crystallizes blood.

1017.name: Tundra Mammoth Calf
1017.description: A young woolly mammoth with tusks beginning to grow. Its protective mother is never far.

1018.name: Reflective Tiger
1018.description: A spotted feline predator perfectly adapted to frozen mountains. It strikes from blinding snowdrifts.

1019.name: Boxing Elemental
1019.description: A living shard of ice whose chilling touch shatters bone and freezes blood in an instant.

1020.name: Free Lobster
1020.description: A small but tenacious crustacean with powerful pincers that can cut through fishing nets

1023.name: Disco Beetle
1023.description: A groovy insect with a mirrored carapace that confuses predators with dazzling light reflections.

1024.name: Bubble Squid
1024.description: A tiny cephalopod that blows soap-like bubbles filled with mild paralytic toxin.

1025.name: Origami Crane
1025.description: A magical paper bird that somehow gained life, its edges sharp enough to cause paper cuts.

1026.name: Cotton Fox
1026.description: A fluffy fox that spins sticky sweet webs. Attracts prey with sugary scent.

1027.name: Kazoo Imp
1027.description: A mischievous creature that attacks with annoying kazoo sounds that somehow cause actual damage.

1028.name: Rubber Familiar
1028.description: An enchanted bath toy that squeaks menacingly and shoots tiny water jets.

1029.name: Glitter Goblin
1029.description: A sparkly menace that throws handfuls of craft glitter that gets everywhere and never comes off.

1030.name: Meme Ghost
1030.description: A spirit that died while scrolling social media and now haunts by showing outdated memes.

1031.name: Sushi Snail
1031.description: A gelatinous creature that smells like soy sauce and wasabi. Leaves rice trails.

1032.name: Electromagnetic Ghoul
1032.description: An electromagnetic ghoul that causes connection issues and drains phone batteries.

1033.name: Karaoke Banshee
1033.description: A tone-deaf spirit that tortures victims with off-key pop songs from the 90s.

1034.name: Pillow Guardian
1034.description: A golem made entirely of couch cushions and blankets. Surprisingly sturdy.

1035.name: Vegetal Vampire
1035.description: A confused bat that only drinks tomato juice. Still bites but feels guilty about it.

1036.name: Expired Ooze
1036.description: A sentient dairy product gone bad. Smells terrible and causes nausea on contact.

1037.name: Fidget Sprite
1037.description: A hyperactive elemental that spins constantly, creating small but annoying whirlwinds.

1038.name: Anxiety Elemental
1038.description: A manifestation of pure worry that makes you remember embarrassing things from years ago.

1039.name: Flamingo Sentinel
1039.description: A plastic yard decoration animated by suburban dark magic. Stands on one leg menacingly.

1040.name: Caffeinated Squirrel
1040.description: A jittery rodent that found someone's espresso. Moves erratically at triple speed.

1041.name: Tax Collector
1041.description: A bureaucratic spirit that drains your gold with endless paperwork attacks.

1042.name: Tourist Skeleton
1042.description: An undead tourist who died taking the perfect photo. Still trying to get good angles.

1043.name: Pregnant Seahorse
1043.description: A desperate vagrant who haunts the city underbelly, surviving on refuse and ambushing the unwary

1045.name: Apprentice Pyromancer
1045.description: A student mage who accidentally burned down their academy and now wanders the wastes

1046.name: Frost-Touched Thrall
1046.description: A frozen corpse animated by ice magic, leaving trails of frost with each shambling step

1047.name: Desert Raider
1047.description: A sun-scorched bandit who attacks travelers for their water supplies

1048.name: Lost Memory
1048.description: A fragment of forgotten thoughts that gained sentience, feeding on nostalgia

1049.name: Pit Fighter
1049.description: A young warrior forced to fight for entertainment in underground arenas

1050.name: Swamp Witch Novice
1050.description: A hermit who practices forbidden bog magic, brewing curses from marsh water

1051.name: Sky Bard
1051.description: A lowly airship crew member who fell from grace and raids floating settlements

1052.name: Crypt Sentinel
1052.description: An ancient guardian whose flesh has long rotted away, still bound to protect forgotten tombs

1053.name: Spore Wanderer
1053.description: A corpse overtaken by fungal growth, spreading toxic clouds with every movement

1054.name: Forest Poacher
1054.description: An outlaw hunter who sets cruel traps and shoots anything that moves

1055.name: Young Fake Hydra
1055.description: A parasitic entity that invades sleeping minds to feast on nightmares

1056.name: Mine Slave
1056.description: A broken laborer who escaped the crystal mines with stolen pickaxe in hand
